title: Selection Group Selected Keys
description: Type definition for the selected keys in a selection group. This type represents either a single selected key or an array of selected keys, depending on whether multiple selection is enabled.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The canonical TypeScript definition for the selection group selected keys type.

props.name: AXSelectionGroupSelectedKeys
props.description: Union type that can be either a single selected key (unknown) for single selection mode or an array of selected keys (unknown[]) for multiple selection mode.
